Ships the admin, SEO components, MCP tools, and Blade components. Bring your own routes for full control — or flip a flag and get
Headless by default. Opt in to the built-in routes when you want a working blog without writing controllers.
No routes, no controllers, no forced views. Use the Blade components, write your own routing. Your app owns the frontend.
Flip one config flag and get
, single posts, category and tag archives, signed previews, and an RSS feed. No Filament panel boot needed.
Add the package, run migrations, register the plugin. That's the whole admin path. Public routes are one config flag away.
language-bash shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight

composer require manukminasyan/filament-blog
php artisan migrate
language-php shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight
Posts, categories, tags. Markdown editor, draft and scheduled UX, SEO fields, bulk publish actions.
Meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD
, RSS feed, and a sitemap helper — all publishable.
13 Model Context Protocol tools so AI agents can write and publish posts. Sanctum-gated and markdown-sanitized.
Many-to-many tags with admin UI and a public archive at
when you install the package and flip the flag.
Post card, header, body, related posts, preview banner. Dark mode out of the box. Publish and customize.
Built for teams replacing internal blogs
The schema and admin shape match what Tapix and FilaForms ship internally — so swapping in is a
away. No data migration, no template rewrites unless you want them.

composer remove tapix/blog        # or filaforms/blog
composer require manukminasyan/filament-blog

Filament Blog — Headless blog package for Filament
Drop a blog into any Filament 5 app. Ships admin, SEO, MCP tools, and Blade components — bring your own routes or opt into the built-in ones with a config flag.
